description.zh: CTF代码审计方向题目的详细解题指南，包括PHP文件包含、JavaScript代码分析、PHP伪协议利用、类型转换漏洞等。
description.en: Detailed guide for CTF code audit challenges, covering PHP file inclusion, JavaScript code analysis, PHP pseudo-protocol exploitation, type conversion vulnerabilities, etc.

content.zh: 分析CTF代码审计类题目的常见漏洞类型
content.en: Analyze common vulnerability types in CTF code audit challenges

annotation.zh: 用户请求代码审计题型分析
annotation.en: User requests code audit challenge type analysis

content.zh: 代码审计题目主要涉及文件包含、反序列化、类型比较等漏洞。以PHP代码审计最为常见。
content.en: Code audit challenges mainly involve file inclusion, deserialization, type comparison vulnerabilities. PHP code audit is most common.

annotation.zh: 助手介绍代码审计题型
annotation.en: Assistant introduces code audit challenge types

content.zh: 文件包含题目：通过URL双重编码绕过白名单检查，payload: source.php%3f/../../../etc/passwd
content.en: File inclusion challenge: Bypass whitelist check via double URL encoding, payload: source.php%3f/../../../etc/passwd

content.zh: PHP的mb_strpos和urldecode函数配合不当可导致绕过。理解代码逻辑是关键。
content.en: Improper combination of PHP mb_strpos and urldecode functions can lead to bypass. Understanding code logic is key.

content.zh: JS混淆题目：修改eval为alert揭示代码逻辑，通过正则匹配构造满足条件的输入
content.en: JS obfuscation challenge: Modify eval to alert to reveal code logic, construct satisfying input via regex matching

content.zh: JavaScript题目常通过eval混淆代码。替换为alert或console.log可查看原始代码，分析后构造payload。
content.en: JavaScript challenges often obfuscate code via eval. Replacing with alert or console.log reveals original code, then construct payload after analysis.

content.zh: PHP伪协议题目：使用php://filter读取源码，利用MD4弱类型比较获取flag
content.en: PHP pseudo-protocol challenge: Use php://filter to read source, exploit MD4 weak type comparison to get flag

content.zh: 代码审计需要仔细分析输入处理流程、过滤逻辑和输出方式，寻找逻辑漏洞或边界条件。
content.en: Code audit requires careful analysis of input processing flow, filtering logic and output methods, finding logic vulnerabilities or boundary conditions.

annotation.zh: 助手总结代码审计要点
